a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: Quote 'Graduate Medical EducationClerkship Programs' is only a navigation label — no clerkship offering details. Should not be emitted as OFFERS_ELECTIVE; downgrade to MISSING_FIELD or rely on the standalone clerkship page.

Quote 'FellowshipsM4 Away RotationsMain Curriculum, Rotations, and Tracks' is a navigation list under Pediatric Residency. Insufficient to assert an OFFERS_VISITING_STUDENT opportunity; requires the dedicated M4 Away Rotations page.
Quote bundles mailing address, email, phone, and fax into one CONTACT_PHONE claim. Should be split into discrete CONTACT_EMAIL and CONTACT_PHONE claims for clean normalization.
Quote conflates two distinct policy references (Tobacco-Free Hiring Provision and Resident Selection Process Policy) under a single normalizedField. Splitting yields more precise downstream signal.

additionalUnresolveds: Page references 'Application Information', 'Application Process', and 'How to Apply' subpages for multiple fellowships and residencies but the GME index does not state IMG eligibility, USMLE step requirements, ECFMG status, or visa sponsorship.
Pediatric Hospital Medicine Fellowship navigation references 'Salary, Benefits, and Perks' but no salary or benefits values appear on this GME index page.
Resident Selection Process Policy and Tobacco-Free Hiring Provision are linked by title only; the GME index does not state the actual selection criteria.
Orlando Health is described as 'integrated academic healthcare system' but the GME index does not name a primary medical-school affiliation as home school vs. visiting/away student status.
recommendedA3Focus: Confirm orh-gme-opp-01 (OFFERS_ELECTIVE from a navigation label) is not promoted to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE — quote is nav-only on a GME page.
Confirm orh-gme-opp-02 (OFFERS_VISITING_STUDENT for M4 Away Rotations) is held at CAUTION_SAFE_INTERNAL_REVIEW or downgraded — source family is GME and quote is nav-only.
Verify all FUTURE_LANE_FELLOWSHIP and FUTURE_LANE_RESIDENCY claims remain FUTURE_LANE_ONLY visibility and are blocked from PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE despite the page being labeled 'For Medical Professionals'.
Check that GME contact email/phone bundling in orh-gme-03 is decomposed before any public publication.
Confirm pharmacy and physical therapy residency claims (orh-gme-a2-02, orh-gme-a2-03) are tagged non-physician where appropriate so they don't surface in physician-residency listings.

a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: Quote describes 'Clerkships' generally for Orlando Health system; this is system-wide policy, not ORMC-specific. A1 declared sourceScope DEPARTMENT_LEVEL but content is HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL. Same scope concern as A1's own sc01/sc02.

Contact block quote concatenates three coordinators with redacted emails. Cleaned text shows email tokens redacted ([email protected]); A3 should recover emails from raw HTML and split into per-coordinator claims.
Specialty list quote is concatenated without delimiters ('Emergency MedicineGeneral Surgery...'). A3 may want a normalized list rendering even though content is verbatim from the cleaned text.

additionalUnresolveds: Cleaned text says international/Canadian-LCME students 'may find application materials as noted below' but the materials block is not clearly delimited beyond the foreign-student CIE 701/702 paragraph; ambiguous whether further off-page materials exist.
ECFMG certification status for foreign medical students is not explicitly stated; only USMLE Step 1/2 (when CIE 702 applies) and CIE form requirements are named.
Whether ORMC specifically is a clerkship rotation site is not stated; ORMC appears only in the ER wait-times footer list.
Email addresses for GME office and three coordinators are redacted to '[email protected]' tokens in the cleaned text and cannot be recovered without raw HTML.
J-1/visa sponsorship for visiting students is not mentioned at all on this page.
recommendedA3Focus: Confirm no PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE promotion for any clerkship claim — content is system-wide Orlando Health, not Orlando Health Orlando Regional Medical Center campus-specific.
Verify the [email protected] redaction tokens have not been misread as literal email addresses by any downstream consumer.
Confirm A1 sc01/sc02 scope-conflict claims are honored by the regate so all c01-c16 claims stay in CAUTION_SAFE_INTERNAL_REVIEW or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
Cross-check that no Tier 2 (residency/fellowship) or Tier 3 (careers/visa) claim is emitted from this page despite the GME URL hint — the page content is Tier 1 visiting student clerkship only.

Quote 'within the Orlando Health system' is explicit system-level language; rotation cap applies across the entire system, not ORMC alone.
